form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 295m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.47) behind Go Larry in a Class 5 on March 26. Placed two back at this track. Must be included.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (16.95) when third at this track in a Class 5. Goes very well off the draw boasting seven wins and five places from 14 starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 295m at this track in a handy (16.83), beating Cool Friends. In winning form but this a tough assignment.

formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 295m at this track in a handy (16.83), beating Cool Friends. In winning form but this a tough assignment.

form.formComment: Placed last time (17.12) at this track in a Class 4/5, finishing second and beaten half a length. Strong record off the draw with four wins and two minors from eight starts. Hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly lost ground and hampered final bend.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won comfortably by 3.5 lengths at this track (17.03) beating Our Sara in a Class 4 on March 26. May well be worth another chance.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (17.11) in a Class 5, finishing a 5 length third. Is yet to miss the placings from this box, including two wins. Can continue the solid form.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by 1.3 lengths in a Class 4 last start at this track, clocking a hot 16.90 for the 295m trip. Can measure up.
